properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We prayed, we hungered, For a move of God To see you move in power like never before Oh God we want more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Revival is Now, Your kingdom is here, Let your glory be revealed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Revival is Now, Your kingdom is here, We will walk in your victory.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We asked, you answered, You said the time has come, We'll rise and carry this fire, So all of the world, Will be left in wonder.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let the winds of revival blow, Let the winds of revival blow, Let the winds of revival blow, Let the winds of revival blow.
